records.command: uv run pytest tests/test_lifecycle_smoke.py -q; make test-workspace; make lint-workspace; git diff --check
records.notes: Issue #1923 adds permanent root lifecycle smoke evidence for workspace, planning, and memory upgrade/uninstall dry-run safety. This is additive behavior-class coverage for high-risk lifecycle mutation safety; it does not prune or replace existing lifecycle evidence.

records.command: uv run pytest tests/test_lifecycle_smoke.py -q; make test-workspace; make lint-workspace; git diff --check
records.notes: Owner is the root workspace lifecycle smoke suite because the trust question is front-door integration: dry-run upgrade and uninstall commands must report dry_run=true and leave installed planning and memory state intact.

records.command: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py::test_setup_surfaces_host_orientation_candidates_for_jumpstarted_repo -q; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; make test-workspace; make lint-workspace; make typecheck; uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py report --target . --section runtime_mirror_consistency --format json; git diff --check
records.notes: Issue #1925 changes the setup guidance payload owned by the workspace CLI runtime. The focused setup test installs AW into a mature-looking host repo and asserts read-only host orientation candidates are exposed without setup findings or durable seeding.
The new host_orientation field is scoped to the setup command payload and text output. It does not widen default start, implement, preflight, or summary payloads.

records.command: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_session_logging.py tests/test_workspace_implement_cli.py packages/planning/tests/test_archive.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_generated_tool_conformance.py -q; make test-workspace; make lint-workspace

records.command: make test-workspace; make test-planning; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q
records.notes: Root workspace suites own cross-command identity and recovery behavior; the Planning archive suite owns exact selected-carry closeout semantics. Full workspace and Planning suites passed after focused boundary proof.

records.command: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_generated_tool_conformance.py -q; make test-workspace; make lint-workspace; make typecheck; uv run python scripts/check/run_operation_conformance_tests.py --target all; uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py report --target . --section runtime_mirror_consistency --format json
records.notes: Issue #2258 proves the command-facing current-work and carry lifecycle across start, implement, work-thread inspect/select/prune, summary, status/doctor, and Planning closeout. Runtime mirror shape is in sync and all generated operation conformance cases pass.

records.command: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_generated_tool_conformance.py -q; make test-workspace
records.notes: Exact carry status is nested under existing current-work/work-thread projections and detailed recovery stays behind work-thread carry-inspect/select/prune. Default start remains forecast-only and does not persist carries; compact start, implement, summary, status, and doctor contracts remain covered by the full workspace suite.
